title: Post-035 Workstation-Migration Readiness Reassessment
objective: Reassess the Olares workstation-migration lane after Packet 035 published the validated Packet 031 source artifact and restored clean parity on `/home/olares/code/apex`, without treating that publication and resync as migration approval.
dependency_note: Packet 035 published the validated Packet 031 two-file source artifact and Packet 030 through Packet 034 authority surfaces in commit `10d57c0e7edf675dd5140ba88621efa2193a6c05`, proved the dirty host source files were byte-equivalent to that commit, and restored `/home/olares/code/apex` to clean parity without force, reset, clean, runtime mutation, service mutation, package mutation, remote rewrite, migration approval, or old-clone mutation.
required_inputs: Packet 035 publication and host-mirror resync handoff
Current `/home/olares/code/apex` branch, commit, cleanliness, and authority-artifact presence
constrained_outputs: A dated post-035 readiness reassessment handoff
A clear lane classification for workstation-migration readiness after the first published production-source host trial

No migration approval, no runtime mutation, no service mutation, no host-side source/test execution, no install, no package or lockfile mutation, no AI-services expansion, no Gitea/code-hosting transition, no canonical-hosting transition, no remote rewrite, no force/reset/clean, and no old-clone mutation
validation_steps: Revalidate that `/home/olares/code/apex` is clean at commit `10d57c0e7edf675dd5140ba88621efa2193a6c05` and contains the Packet 031 through Packet 035 authority artifacts needed for interpretation.
Separate the meaning of a published, validated production-source host trial from full Olares-first daily development migration readiness.
Assess whether the lane remains narrow-application-source-trial-ready, advances to a second bounded source/test trial posture, or should pause for publication-authority cleanup.

Preserve separate no-go surfaces for migration approval, runtime or service mutation, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting, canonical-hosting, remote rewrite, package mutation, and old-clone mutation.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes no database writes and no runtime, service, package, lockfile, install, source execution, remote, AI-services, Gitea, canonical-hosting, migration, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation. It authorizes only a readiness reassessment handoff and bounded authority updates.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-04. Packet 036 revalidated `/home/olares/code/apex` as clean on `clean-main` at commit `10d57c0e7edf675dd5140ba88621efa2193a6c05`, confirmed Packet 031 through Packet 035 published authority artifacts are present except for workstation-local Packet 035 closure handoff and Packet 036 draft/closure surfaces, preserved `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` untouched at `2836a2622309b4e146ca24f23b5bf87312c0c857`, classified the lane as conditionally ready for another bounded source/test trial posture only after authority cleanup, and kept migration, runtime mutation, service mutation, package mutation, AI-services, Gitea/code-hosting, canonical-hosting, remote rewrite, force/reset/clean, and old-clone mutation closed.
next_action: Open only Packet 037 for Packet 035 and Packet 036 authority publication and host-mirror resync. Do not treat Packet 036 as migration approval, and do not open another host-side source/test execution lane before authority parity is restored.
